description_long: This house features a classic, symmetrical facade with a steeply pitched gable roof and dormer windows, evoking a traditional architectural style. The front entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps, flanked by decorative columns and a prominent arched window above the door. The exterior walls are finished in a light-colored material, likely stucco or painted brick, with contrasting dark roof shingles. Large, mature trees and a manicured lawn surround the property, adding to its suburban charm. Windows are arranged in a balanced, orderly fashion, with both rectangular and arched shapes visible. The house sits on a raised foundation with a paved walkway leading to the main entrance, and a driveway is present on one side.
description: A traditional two-story house with a steep gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a prominent front porch, surrounded by trees and a manicured lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, arched window above the door, and symmetrical facade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the house, driveway, and additional landscaping with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backyard area, large tree, and back entrance or patio space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the lawn, side windows, and secondary entry features.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, small porch, decorative columns, and an arched window above the entry.
